name: Quaker's Original 1955 Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup sour milk (Add lemon juice to regular milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the first five ingredients together.
2. Cream the Crisco shortening and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the eggs, beating well after each addition.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour mixture) to the sugar-egg mixture, alternating with milk, until combined.
5. Stir in the last three ingredients (rolled oats, raisins, and chopped nuts).
6. Drop by spoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for the cookies to become golden brown.
